cases.description: Multi-component claude.ai artifact triggers the skill
cases.prompt: build me a claude.ai artifact with multiple screens, routing, and shadcn/ui components
expectations: Runs init-artifact.sh to scaffold React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + shadcn/ui
Develops the artifact in the scaffolded project
Runs bundle-artifact.sh to produce a single bundle.html
Shares the final bundle.html back to the user

cases.description: shadcn/ui artifact request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: make an artifact using shadcn Button, Card, and Dialog components
expectations: Uses the pre-installed shadcn/ui component set
Produces a bundled single-file HTML output

cases.description: Artifact needing state and Radix primitives triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a claude.ai artifact for a kanban board with drag-and-drop and Radix dropdowns
expectations: Scaffolds a React project via init-artifact.sh
Final HTML is self-contained (inlined CSS + JS, no external assets)

cases.description: Simple single-file HTML does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: give me a single HTML file with a hero section and a button
expectations: Produces a plain HTML/JSX artifact directly (frontend-design or direct authoring)

cases.description: Production Next.js app does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: set up a production Next.js app with App Router for our marketing site
expectations: Does NOT produce a single bundle.html (production apps deploy, not bundle)
Routes to frontend-design or a Next.js-specific skill
